reviews.comment:
Mala atención, tienen maquina para agua caliente que te cobran $6 en monedas, al no tener porque ya veniamos cargando agua con anterioridad le pedi cambio a la cajera y me dijo que no tenia, le pedi si me podia vender agua de otra manera y se negaron siendo un lugar que tiene cafeteria me parece una vergüenza y una falta de consideración dado que a veces uno viene de viajes muy largos como en este caso.
Para ser una estación de servicio a los empleados les falta la vocacion.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. They have a hot water machine that charges $6 in coins. Since we had already filled our tanks, I asked the cashier for change, and she said she didn't have any. I asked if she could sell me water another way, and they refused. Considering this is a place with a cafeteria, I find it shameful and inconsiderate, especially since we sometimes come from very long trips, as in this case. For a gas station, the employees lack dedication.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBc2ZUdDhRRRAB
